hourly_summary: 本小时共收录 105 条：AI 40 条、策略交易 10 条、加密货币 25 条、世界事件 20 条、财经 10 条。重点关注：【FINANCE】会议纪要显示，尽管受到战争影响，美联储官员仍预计今年降息；【FINANCE】Visa推出新的人工智能工具来管理收费争议流程；【WORLD】伊朗战争实时更新：黎巴嫩僵局威胁停火，以色列打击真主党。

items.title: Fed officials still foresee rate cut this year, despite war impacts, minutes show
items.summary: Policymakers said they would need to remain "nimble" as they weighed the impact the war had on inflation.
items.title_zh: 会议纪要显示，尽管受到战争影响，美联储官员仍预计今年降息
items.summary_zh: 政策制定者表示，在权衡战争对通胀的影响时，他们需要保持“灵活”。

items.title: Visa launches new AI tools to manage the charge dispute process
items.summary: Visa's new tools are part of a larger push by major banks and financial institutions to incorporate AI into their businesses.
items.title_zh: Visa推出新的人工智能工具来管理收费争议流程
items.summary_zh: Visa 的新工具是主要银行和金融机构将人工智能融入其业务的更大努力的一部分。

items.title: Iran War Live Updates: Israel Strikes Hezbollah as Lebanon Impasse Threatens Cease-Fire
items.summary: Israel said it would continue striking the Iran-backed militia. Iran said it would not attend peace talks with the United States in Pakistan if the truce was not extended to Lebanon.
items.title_zh: 伊朗战争实时更新：黎巴嫩僵局威胁停火，以色列打击真主党
items.summary_zh: 以色列表示将继续打击伊朗支持的民兵组织。伊朗表示，如果休战协议不延长至黎巴嫩，伊朗将不会参加在巴基斯坦举行的与美国的和谈。

items.title: ETH, SOL, DOGE slide as Bitcoin fails to break $73,000 for the third time since the ceasefire
items.summary: The level that has capped every rally during the six-week war remains intact, with analysts saying $75,000 needs to break before the market enters a genuine bullish phase.
items.title_zh: ETH、SOL、DOGE 下跌，比特币自停火以来第三次未能突破 73,000 美元
items.summary_zh: 六周战争期间限制每次上涨的水平仍然完好无损，分析师表示，在市场进入真正的看涨阶段之前，需要突破 75,000 美元。

items.title: BlackRock rips page from hedge fund playbook, applies it to exchange-traded funds
items.summary: BlackRock's Jeffrey Rosenberg has a leading role in the firm's liquid alt ETFs — which use a long-short strategy in ETF wrappers.
items.title_zh: 贝莱德借鉴对冲基金策略，将其应用于交易所交易基金
items.summary_zh: 贝莱德 (BlackRock) 的杰弗里·罗森伯格 (Jeffrey Rosenberg) 在该公司的流动性替代 ETF 中发挥着主导作用，该 ETF 在 ETF 包装中使用多空策略。

items.title: Behind China's 'active efforts' for an Iran ceasefire: Business trumps politics
items.summary: The big risk for Beijing is that the Iran war drags down global demand for the exports that are driving China's economic growth.
items.title_zh: 中国“积极努力”推动伊朗停火背后：商业胜过政治
items.summary_zh: 北京面临的最大风险是伊朗战争拖累了全球对推动中国经济增长的出口需求。

items.title: Ceasefire or no ceasefire, the Middle East's reshuffling is not yet done
items.summary: Both sides have reason to end the war but share no common ground.
items.title_zh: 停火还是不停火，中东洗牌尚未完成
items.summary_zh: 双方都有结束战争的理由，但没有共同点。

items.title: This Hungarian Town Explains Why Orban Could Lose on Sunday
items.summary: Lake Balaton was beloved as a vacation spot. Now, luxury real estate projects serve many friends of Prime Minister Viktor Orban, and the locals are fed up.
items.title_zh: 这个匈牙利小镇解释了为什么欧尔班可能会在周日失败
items.summary_zh: 巴拉顿湖作为度假胜地深受人们喜爱。现在，豪华房地产项目服务于总理欧尔班·维克托的许多朋友，当地人已经厌倦了。

items.title: Zelensky Sees Small Window for Peace
items.summary: Talks to end the war in Ukraine could resume soon, said President Volodymyr Zelensky as he expressed skepticism about a breakthrough.
items.title_zh: 泽伦斯基认为和平之窗很小
items.summary_zh: 总统泽连斯基表示，结束乌克兰战争的谈判可能很快就会恢复，他对取得突破表示怀疑。

items.title: HSBC and Standard Chartered-led group land Hong Kong’s first stablecoin licenses
items.summary: The approvals by the Hong Kong Monetary Authority, the territory's central bank, mark the first batch under the Stablecoins Ordinance, which took effect in August 2025.
items.title_zh: 汇丰银行和渣打银行牵头的集团获得香港首张稳定币牌照
items.summary_zh: 香港金融管理局（香港中央银行）的批准标志着《稳定币条例》的第一批批准，该条例于 2025 年 8 月生效。

items.title: Quantum-safe bitcoin now possible without a soft fork, but costs $200 a pop, new research shows
items.summary: A new scheme from a StarkWare researcher works under existing consensus rules, offering an emergency fallback while BIP-360 awaits activation.
items.title_zh: 新研究显示，量子安全比特币现在无需软分叉即可实现，但每次价格为 200 美元
items.summary_zh: StarkWare 研究人员的一项新方案在现有共识规则下运行，在 BIP-360 等待激活时提供紧急后备方案。

items.title: StarkWare researcher proposes ‘quantum-safe’ Bitcoin transactions without a soft fork
items.summary: It may face limited adoption due to higher costs and a complex user experience, with the proposal described as a “last-resort measure.”
items.title_zh: StarkWare 研究人员提出无需软分叉的“量子安全”比特币交易
items.summary_zh: 由于成本较高和用户体验复杂，它的采用可能会受到限制，该提案被描述为“最后的手段”。

items.title: Offbeat Wall Street research firm says it sent an analyst to Strait of Hormuz. Here's what they learned
items.summary: Before the U.S and Israel began their war against Iran, about 20% of the world's oil was shipped through the narrow Strait of Hormuz.
items.title_zh: 另类华尔街研究公司表示，已派出一名分析师前往霍尔木兹海峡。这是他们学到的
items.summary_zh: 在美国和以色列对伊朗发动战争之前，世界上大约 20% 的石油是通过狭窄的霍尔木兹海峡运输的。

items.title: Bitcoin holds steady as inflation data looms, bittensor drama unfolds
items.summary: Traders face a pivotal Friday as narrowing volatility on bitcoin's chart hints at a massive price move while bittensor faces a high-profile developer exit.
items.title_zh: 随着通胀数据的临近，比特币保持稳定，bittensor 戏剧上演
items.summary_zh: 周五交易员面临着关键时刻，因为比特币图表上波动性的缩小暗示着价格的大幅波动，而 bittensor 则面临着开发商的高调退出。

items.title: TD Cowen cuts Strategy price target to $350, initiates coverage of Sharplink, Strive, Nakamoto and Smarter Web with buy ratings
items.summary: TD Cowen cut its Strategy price target to $350 on lower bitcoin assumptions while assigning buy ratings to four digital asset treasury firms.
items.title_zh: TD Cowen 将 Strategy 目标价下调至 350 美元，并开始对 Sharplink、Strive、Nakamoto 和 Smarter Web 给予买入评级
items.summary_zh: 由于比特币假设较低，TD Cowen 将其策略价格目标下调至 350 美元，同时给予四家数字资产财务公司买入评级。

items.title: CryptoQuant says bitcoin, ether rally driven by new long positions in perpetual futures
items.summary: Open interest in BTC and ETH perpetual futures rose by over $2 billion each in 24 hours after the U.S.-Iran ceasefire announcement.
items.title_zh: CryptoQuant 表示，比特币、以太坊上涨是由永续期货新多头头寸推动的
items.summary_zh: 在美伊宣布停火后 24 小时内，BTC 和 ETH 永续期货的未平仓合约分别增加了超过 20 亿美元。

items.title: Helping data centers deliver higher performance with less hardware
items.summary: Researchers developed a system that intelligently balances workloads to improve the efficiency of flash storage hardware in a data center.
items.title_zh: 帮助数据中心以更少的硬件提供更高的性能
items.summary_zh: 研究人员开发了一种智能平衡工作负载的系统，以提高数据中心闪存存储硬件的效率。

items.title: MIT engineers design proteins by their motion, not just their shape
items.summary: An AI model generates novel proteins based on how they vibrate and move, opening new possibilities for dynamic biomaterials and adaptive therapeutics.
items.title_zh: 麻省理工学院的工程师根据蛋白质的运动而不仅仅是形状来设计蛋白质
items.summary_zh: 人工智能模型根据蛋白质的振动和移动方式生成新型蛋白质，为动态生物材料和适应性治疗开辟了新的可能性。

items.title: Blue Owl caps private credit funds redemptions at 5% after steep request levels
items.summary: Blue Owl attributed the higher-than-usual requests to "heightened market concerns around AI-related disruption to software companies."
items.title_zh: 在要求水平过高后，Blue Owl 将私人信贷基金赎回上限限制在 5%
items.summary_zh: Blue Owl 将高于平常的请求归因于“市场对人工智能相关软件公司中断的担忧加剧”。

items.title: Warren Buffett says Iran bomb would make nuclear disaster harder to avoid
items.summary: The Berkshire Hathaway chairman said the growing number of nuclear-armed states has fundamentally altered the global risk landscape.
items.title_zh: 沃伦·巴菲特称伊朗炸弹将使核灾难更难以避免
items.summary_zh: 这位伯克希尔哈撒韦公司董事长表示，越来越多的核武器国家从根本上改变了全球风险格局。

items.title: Trump says Iran's handling of Strait of Hormuz is 'not the agreement we have'
items.summary: The US president accused Iran of "doing a very poor job" with the waterway as Israel and Lebanon to begin peace talks.
items.title_zh: 特朗普称伊朗处理霍尔木兹海峡的方式“不是我们达成的协议”
items.summary_zh: 在以色列和黎巴嫩开始和平谈判之际，美国总统指责伊朗在水道方面“做得非常糟糕”。

items.title: Iran’s Battered Leaders Emerge From War Confident — and With New Cards
items.summary: For Iran’s theocratic rulers, just surviving the U.S.-Israeli onslaught means victory. But the seeds of their next crisis may already be planted.
items.title_zh: 饱受打击的伊朗领导人从战争中走出来，充满信心，并持有新牌
items.summary_zh: 对于伊朗的神权统治者来说，在美国和以色列的猛攻中幸存下来就意味着胜利。但下一次危机的种子可能已经埋下。

items.title: XRP adjacent Flare proposes protocol-level MEV capture and 40% inflation cut
items.summary: The proposal would move block building away from individual validators, create a revenue entity called FIRE to buy and burn FLR, and reduce annual token inflation to 3%.
items.title_zh: XRP 相邻 Flare 提出协议级 MEV 捕获和 40% 通胀削减
items.summary_zh: 该提案将使区块建设远离个人验证者，创建一个名为 FIRE 的收入实体来购买和销毁 FLR，并将年度代币通胀率降低至 3%。

items.title: Japan moves to classify cryptocurrencies as financial products
items.summary: The new rules ban insider trading, require issuers to publish annual disclosures, and impose stricter penalties: up to 10 years in prison and 10 million yen in fines for operating without registration.
items.title_zh: 日本采取行动将加密货币归类为金融产品
items.summary_zh: 新规定禁止内幕交易，要求发行人公布年度披露信息，并实施更严厉的处罚：未经注册经营的最高可判处 10 年监禁和 1000 万日元罚款。

items.title: Galaxy stock rallies 11% after annual report shows core business profitable despite $241 million net loss
items.summary: Galaxy's Digital Assets segment, housing its trading, lending, asset management, and staking services, generated a $505 million profit.
items.title_zh: 尽管净亏损 2.41 亿美元，但年度报告显示核心业务实现盈利，Galaxy 股价上涨 11%
items.summary_zh: Galaxy 的数字资产部门提供交易、借贷、资产管理和质押服务，创造了 5.05 亿美元的利润。

items.title: Trending Crypto: Bittensor (TAO)
items.summary: CoinGecko trending rank #38.
items.title_zh: 加密货币趋势：Bittensor (TAO)
items.summary_zh: CoinGecko 趋势排名第 38 位。

items.title: Trending Crypto: Monad (MON)
items.summary: CoinGecko trending rank #115.
items.title_zh: 加密货币趋势：Monad (MON)
items.summary_zh: CoinGecko 趋势排名第 115 位。

items.title: Trending Crypto: RaveDAO (RAVE)
items.summary: CoinGecko trending rank #134.
items.title_zh: 加密货币趋势：RaveDAO (RAVE)
items.summary_zh: CoinGecko 趋势排名第 134 位。

items.title: Trending Crypto: Zcash (ZEC)
items.summary: CoinGecko trending rank #19.
items.title_zh: 流行加密货币：Zcash (ZEC)
items.summary_zh: CoinGecko 趋势排名第 19。

items.title: Trending Crypto: World Liberty Financial (WLFI)
items.summary: CoinGecko trending rank #37.
items.title_zh: 加密货币趋势：世界自由金融 (WLFI)
items.summary_zh: CoinGecko 趋势排名第 37 名。

items.title: CyberAgent moves faster with ChatGPT Enterprise and Codex
items.summary: CyberAgent uses ChatGPT Enterprise and Codex to securely scale AI adoption, improve quality, and accelerate decisions across advertising, media, and gaming.
items.title_zh: Cyber​​Agent 借助 ChatGPT Enterprise 和 Codex 加快步伐
items.summary_zh: Cyber​​Agent 使用 ChatGPT Enterprise 和 Codex 安全地扩展 AI 的采用、提高质量并加快广告、媒体和游戏领域的决策。

items.title: The next phase of enterprise AI
items.summary: OpenAI outlines the next phase of enterprise AI, as adoption accelerates across industries with Frontier, ChatGPT Enterprise, Codex, and company-wide AI agents.
items.title_zh: 企业人工智能的下一阶段
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 概述了企业人工智能的下一阶段，随着 Frontier、ChatGPT Enterprise、Codex 和全公司人工智能代理的跨行业采用加速。

items.title: OpenAI acquires TBPN
items.summary: OpenAI acquires TBPN to accelerate global conversations around AI and support independent media, expanding dialogue with builders, businesses, and the broader tech community.
items.title_zh: OpenAI 收购 TBPN
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 收购 TBPN 是为了加速围绕人工智能的全球对话并支持独立媒体，扩大与建筑商、企业和更广泛的技术社区的对话。

items.title: Gradient Labs gives every bank customer an AI account manager
items.summary: Gradient Labs uses GPT-4.1 and GPT-5.4 mini and nano to power AI agents that automate banking support workflows with low latency and high reliability.
items.title_zh: Gradient Labs 为每一位银行客户提供人工智能客户经理
items.summary_zh: Gradient Labs 使用 GPT-4.1 和 GPT-5.4 mini 和 nano 为 AI 代理提供支持，以低延迟和高可靠性自动化银行支持工作流程。

items.title: New technique makes AI models leaner and faster while they’re still learning
items.summary: Researchers use control theory to shed unnecessary complexity from AI models during training, cutting compute costs without sacrificing performance.
items.title_zh: 新技术使人工智能模型在学习过程中变得更精简、更快
items.summary_zh: 研究人员利用控制理论在训练过程中消除人工智能模型不必要的复杂性，在不牺牲性能的情况下降低计算成本。

items.title: Preview tool helps makers visualize 3D-printed objects
items.summary: By quickly generating aesthetically accurate previews of fabricated objects, the VisiPrint system could make prototyping faster and less wasteful.
items.title_zh: 预览工具可帮助创客可视化 3D 打印物体
items.summary_zh: 通过快速生成美观准确的预制件预览，VisiPrint 系统可以加快原型制作速度并减少浪费。

items.title: MIT researchers use AI to uncover atomic defects in materials
items.summary: A new model measures defects that can be leveraged to improve materials’ mechanical strength, heat transfer, and energy-conversion efficiency.
items.title_zh: 麻省理工学院的研究人员利用人工智能发现材料中的原子缺陷
items.summary_zh: 一种新模型可测量可用来提高材料机械强度、传热和能量转换效率的缺陷。

items.title: Alibaba leads $290 million investment for building a new kind of AI model as LLM limits emerge
items.summary: Startup Shengshu plans to use the money for a "general world model," paving the way for more practical robot applications.
items.title_zh: 随着 LLM 限制的出现，阿里巴巴领投 2.9 亿美元用于构建新型人工智能模型
items.summary_zh: 初创公司盛树计划将这笔资金用于“通用世界模型”，为更实际的机器人应用铺平道路。

items.title: Recent Quant Links from Quantocracy as of 03/31/2026
items.summary: This is a summary of links recently featured on Quantocracy as of Tuesday, 03/31/2026. To see our most recent links, visit the Quant Mashup. Read on readers! Selling Volatility: The Most Seductive Backtest in Finance [Quantt] Here is a strategy with a thirty-year track record. Se
items.title_zh: 截至 2026 年 3 月 31 日，来自 Quantocracy 的最新量化链接
items.summary_zh: 这是截至 2026 年 3 月 31 日星期二 Quantocracy 上最近推荐的链接的摘要。要查看我们最新的链接，请访问 Quant Mashup。请读者阅读！卖出波动性：金融领域最诱人的回测 [Quantt] 这是一个拥有三十年记录的策略。硒

items.title: Institutions' bitcoin positioning lacks conviction; CPI, Iran talks might help
items.summary: Institutions are betting on the bitcoin price hitting $80,000 through call options, but they are also buying downside protection.
items.title_zh: 机构对比特币的定位缺乏说服力； CPI、伊朗会谈可能有所帮助
items.summary_zh: 机构通过看涨期权押注比特币价格将触及 80,000 美元，但他们也在购买下行保护。

items.title: David Bailey’s bitcoin holder Nakamoto is trying to stay on Nasdaq with a reverse stock split
items.summary: The stock has plunged roughly 99% from its May 2025 peak as pressure builds on the bitcoin treasury firm.
items.title_zh: 大卫贝利的比特币持有者中本正试图通过反向股票分割留在纳斯达克
items.summary_zh: 由于比特币财务公司面临的压力越来越大，该股已较 2025 年 5 月的峰值下跌约 99%。

items.title: XRP may be less exposed to quantum computer threats than bitcoin, experts say
items.summary: XRP’s design leaves a smaller share of its supply exposed to future quantum attacks than Bitcoin’s, experts said, pointing to additional XRPL features that stand out.
items.title_zh: 专家表示，XRP 可能比比特币更少受到量子计算机威胁
items.summary_zh: 专家表示，与比特币相比，XRP 的设计使其暴露在未来量子攻击中的供应份额更小，并指出了 XRPL 的其他突出功能。

items.title: Bitget debuts IPO Prime market with SpaceX pre-IPO exposure token
items.summary: Bitget has launched IPO Prime, a subscription-based market for pre-IPO tokenized allocations, with SpaceX's preSPAX as its first offering.
items.title_zh: Bitget 通过 SpaceX 上市前风险代币首次亮相 Prime 市场
items.summary_zh: Bitget 推出了 IPO Prime，这是一个基于订阅的市场，用于 IPO 前代币化分配，SpaceX 的 preSPAX 是其首个产品。

items.title: Announcing the OpenAI Safety Fellowship
items.summary: A pilot program to support independent safety and alignment research and develop the next generation of talent
items.title_zh: 宣布 OpenAI 安全奖学金
items.summary_zh: 支持独立安全和对准研究并培养下一代人才的试点计划

items.title: Multimodal Embedding & Reranker Models with Sentence Transformers
items.title_zh: 带有句子变压器的多模态嵌入和重新排序模型

items.title: Training mRNA Language Models Across 25 Species for $165
items.title_zh: 训练 25 个物种的 mRNA 语言模型，仅需 165 美元

items.title: The latest AI news we announced in March 2026
items.summary: Here are Google’s latest AI updates from March 2026
items.title_zh: 我们于 2026 年 3 月公布的最新 AI 新闻
items.summary_zh: 以下是 Google 自 2026 年 3 月起最新的 AI 更新

items.title: Build with Veo 3.1 Lite, our most cost-effective video generation model
items.summary: Veo 3.1 Lite is now available in paid preview through the Gemini API and for testing in Google AI Studio.
items.title_zh: 使用我们最具成本效益的视频生成模型 Veo 3.1 Lite 进行构建
items.summary_zh: Veo 3.1 Lite 现已通过 Gemini API 提供付费预览版，并可在 Google AI Studio 中进行测试。

items.title: Build with Lyria 3, our newest music generation model
items.summary: Lyria 3 is now available in paid preview through the Gemini API and for testing in Google AI Studio.
items.title_zh: 使用我们最新的音乐生成模型 Lyria 3 进行构建
items.summary_zh: Lyria 3 现已通过 Gemini API 提供付费预览版，并可在 Google AI Studio 中进行测试。

items.title: A philosophy of work
items.summary: As the NC Ethics of Technology Postdoctoral Fellow, Michal Masny is advancing dialogue, teaching, and research into the social and ethical dimensions of new computing technologies.
items.title_zh: 工作哲学
items.summary_zh: 作为北卡罗来纳州技术伦理学博士后研究员，Michal Masny 正在推进新计算技术的社会和伦理层面的对话、教学和研究。

items.title: Evaluating the ethics of autonomous systems
items.summary: MIT researchers developed a testing framework that pinpoints situations where AI decision-support systems are not treating people and communities fairly.
items.title_zh: 评估自治系统的伦理
items.summary_zh: 麻省理工学院的研究人员开发了一个测试框架，可以查明人工智能决策支持系统不公平对待人和社区的情况。

items.title: Ray Dalio: Trump-Xi meeting to focus on trade, capital flows
items.summary: Bridgewater founder Ray Dalio told CNBC he is optimistic about the outcome of a meeting between the U.S. and Chinese presidents next month.
items.title_zh: 雷·达里奥：特习会聚焦贸易和资本流动
items.summary_zh: 桥水基金创始人雷·达里奥 (Ray Dalio) 告诉 CNBC，他对下个月中美两国元首会晤的结果持乐观态度。

items.title: JPMorgan CEO Jamie Dimon in annual letter cites risks in geopolitics, AI and private markets
items.summary: JPMorgan CEO Jamie Dimon in his annual letter to shareholders noted the country's 250th anniversary and called for a broad recommitment to American ideals.
items.title_zh: 摩根大通首席执行官杰米戴蒙在年度信中提到了地缘政治、人工智能和私募市场的风险
items.summary_zh: 摩根大通首席执行官杰米·戴蒙 (Jamie Dimon) 在致股东的年度信中提到了美国成立 250 周年，并呼吁对美国理想做出广泛的重新承诺。

items.title: Melania Trump denies ties to Jeffrey Epstein and urges hearing for survivors
items.summary: She called rumours that Epstein introduced her to Donald Trump "mean-spirited attempts to defame my reputation".
items.title_zh: 梅拉尼娅·特朗普否认与杰弗里·爱泼斯坦有关系，并敦促为幸存者举行听证会
items.summary_zh: 她称有关爱泼斯坦将她介绍给唐纳德·特朗普的谣言是“卑鄙的企图诽谤我的声誉”。

items.title: Taiwan opposition leader meets Xi Jinping in Beijing
items.summary: Cheng Li-wun is the Kuomintang's first sitting leader to visit China in a decade.
items.title_zh: 台湾反对党领袖在北京会见习近平
items.summary_zh: 郑立文是十年来第一位访问中国的国民党现任领导人。

items.title: German transgender far-right extremist arrested in Czech Republic
items.summary: German media reports say Marla-Svenja Liebich used to be a member of a neo-Nazi group called Blood and Honour.
items.title_zh: 德国跨性别极右翼极端分子在捷克被捕
items.summary_zh: 德国媒体报道称，玛拉-斯文贾·利比希曾经是一个名为“鲜血与荣誉”的新纳粹组织的成员。

items.title: Russia and Ukraine agree to truce for Orthodox Easter
items.summary: Vladimir Putin announced the truce, which will last from Saturday afternoon on 11 April through Easter Sunday.
items.title_zh: 俄罗斯和乌克兰同意在东正教复活节休战
items.summary_zh: 弗拉基米尔·普京宣布休战，休战期将从 4 月 11 日星期六下午持续到复活节星期日。

items.title: White House staff told not to place bets on prediction markets
items.summary: The gambling platforms have grown in popularity, with some users making wagers on conflicts.
items.title_zh: 白宫工作人员被告知不要在预测市场上下注
items.summary_zh: 赌博平台越来越受欢迎，一些用户对冲突下注。

items.title: US has let in 4,499 refugees since October - all but three were South African
items.summary: Trump has given priority to Afrikaners, a white minority group he says is being persecuted. South Africa has objected to his characterisation.
items.title_zh: 自 10 月以来，美国已接纳 4,499 名难民，其中除三人外均为南非人
items.summary_zh: 特朗普优先考虑了南非荷兰语人，他说这是一个受到迫害的白人少数群体。南非反对他的描述。

items.title: India proposes new rules to regulate news and political posts on social media
items.summary: The changes will give government more power over news-related posts shared by podcasters and influencers.
items.title_zh: 印度提出新规则来规范社交媒体上的新闻和政治帖子
items.summary_zh: 这些变化将使政府对播客和影响者分享的新闻相关帖子拥有更大的权力。

items.title: Hip-hop pioneer, Afrika Bambaataa,  dies aged 68
items.summary: The Bronx born rapper's global hit Planet Rock is credited with shaping hip-hop in the 1980s.
items.title_zh: 嘻哈先驱 Afrika Bambaataa 去世，享年 68 岁
items.summary_zh: 这位出生于布朗克斯的说唱歌手的全球热门歌曲《Planet Rock》被认为塑造了 20 世纪 80 年代的嘻哈音乐。

items.title: With Iran Setting Limits, Strait of Hormuz Remains Thorny Politically
items.summary: Even after a cease-fire, Iran is keeping a chokehold on traffic, forcing countries to cut deals that could put them at odds with the U.S.
items.title_zh: 随着伊朗设定限制，霍尔木兹海峡在政治上仍然棘手
items.summary_zh: 即使停火之后，伊朗仍保持交通堵塞，迫使各国达成可能与美国发生冲突的协议。

items.title: Xi Meets Taiwan Opposition Leader for First Time in a Decade
items.summary: Xi Jinping held rare talks with a Taiwanese opposition leader, Cheng Li-wun, who floated the idea of some day inviting Mr. Xi to visit Taiwan.
items.title_zh: 习近平十年来首次会见台湾反对党领袖
items.summary_zh: 习近平与台湾反对派领导人郑立文进行了罕见的会谈，郑立文提出了有一天邀请习近平访问台湾的想法。

items.title: South African Writer Mfundi Vundla Gets Personal in His New Play
items.summary: Mfundi Vundla spent 21 years in exile and created the popular television show “Generations.” His latest project is a play that explores the imperfections of the fight against apartheid.
items.title_zh: 南非作家 Mfundi Vundla 在他的新剧中展现个人魅力
items.summary_zh: 姆丰迪·温德拉 (Mfundi Vundla) 在流亡中度过了 21 年，并创作了热门电视节目“Generations”。他的最新项目是一部探讨反对种族隔离斗争的不完美之处的戏剧。

items.title: Many Venezuelans Want to Go Home. But They Can’t Get Passports.
items.summary: The U.S. has made it impossible for them to stay legally, and their own country makes it difficult for them to return.
items.title_zh: 许多委内瑞拉人想回家。但他们拿不到护照。
items.summary_zh: 美国让他们无法合法居留，自己的国家也让他们很难回国。

items.title: A Cease-Fire for Now in Iran, but a Blow to American Credibility
items.summary: Critics wonder if this is America’s “Suez moment,” when a leading power signals the start of its international decline.
items.title_zh: 伊朗暂时停火，但对美国信誉的打击
items.summary_zh: 批评者怀疑这是否是美国的“苏伊士时刻”，即一个领先大国标志着其国际衰落的开始。

items.title: The Hit Erotica Writers Outwitting Nigeria’s Religious Censors
items.summary: Zealous officials burned their predecessors’ romance novels. Now, young Muslim women in northern Nigeria publish their erotic books in installments on WhatsApp.
items.title_zh: 热门情色作家智取尼日利亚宗教审查
items.summary_zh: 热心的官员烧毁了前任的言情小说。现在，尼日利亚北部的年轻穆斯林妇女在 WhatsApp 上分期出版她们的色情书籍。

items.title: XRP edges higher to $1.35 on breakout, but bullish momentum still lacks
items.summary: Strong volume pushed price above $1.34, though weak fundamentals and overhead resistance continue to cap follow-through.
items.title_zh: XRP 突破后小幅上涨至 1.35 美元，但看涨势头仍然缺乏
items.summary_zh: 强劲的成交量推动价格突破 1.34 美元，但疲软的基本面和上方阻力继续限制后续走势。

items.title: HSBC and Anchorpoint Financial gain first Hong Kong stablecoin issuer licenses
items.summary: Anchorpoint Financial is a joint venture between Standard Chartered, Animoca Brands, and Hong Kong Telecommunications.
items.title_zh: 汇丰银行和 Anchorpoint Financial 获得首张香港稳定币发行人牌照
items.summary_zh: Anchorpoint Financial 是渣打银行、Animoca Brands 和香港电讯的合资企业。

items.title: Japan’s cabinet approves bill to classify crypto assets as financial products: Nikkei
items.summary: If passed during the current parliamentary session, the legislation would take effect as early as fiscal 2027, Nikkei reported.
items.title_zh: 日本内阁批准将加密资产归类为金融产品的法案：日经新闻
items.summary_zh: 据《日经新闻》报道，如果在本届议会会议期间获得通过，该法案最早将在 2027 财年生效。

items.title: World Liberty defends borrowing position on Dolomite, dismisses liquidation concerns as ‘FUD’
items.summary: The project said it did supply WLFI as collateral and borrowed stablecoins, but it is 'nowhere near liquidation.'
items.title_zh: World Liberty 捍卫白云石借款立场，将清算担忧斥为“FUD”
items.summary_zh: 该项目表示，它确实提供了 WLFI 作为抵押品并借入了稳定币，但“远未接近清算”。

items.title: ‘It is decentralization theatre’: Covenant AI exits Bittensor, TAO drops 15%
items.summary: Covenant AI claimed Bittensor's decentralization promise is false, citing 'punitive actions' from the network's co-founder, Jacob Steeves.
items.title_zh: “这是去中心化戏剧”：Covenant AI 退出 Bittensor，TAO 下跌 15%
items.summary_zh: Covenant AI 声称 Bittensor 的去中心化承诺是错误的，并援引了该网络联合创始人 Jacob Steeves 的“惩罚性行动”。

items.title: Binance’s Changpeng Zhao claims U.S. crypto rivals ‘paid millions’ to block his pardon
items.summary: The Binance founder also says friends told him firms funded "smear articles" because they opposed Binance doing business in the U.S.
items.title_zh: 币安的赵长鹏声称美国加密货币竞争对手“支付了数百万美元”来阻止他的赦免
items.summary_zh: 这位币安创始人还表示，朋友们告诉他，一些公司资助“诽谤文章”，因为他们反对币安在美国开展业务。

items.title: OpenAI Full Fan Mode Contest: Terms & Conditions
items.summary: Explore the official terms and conditions for the OpenAI Full Fan Mode Contest, including eligibility, entry steps, judging criteria, and prize details. Learn how to participate, submit your entry on Instagram, and win IPL match tickets.
items.title_zh: OpenAI 全粉丝模式竞赛：条款和条件
items.summary_zh: 了解 OpenAI 全粉丝模式大赛的官方条款和条件，包括资格、参赛步骤、评审标准和奖品详情。了解如何参与、在 Instagram 上提交参赛作品并赢得 IPL 比赛门票。

items.title: Introducing the Child Safety Blueprint
items.summary: Discover OpenAI’s Child Safety Blueprint—a roadmap for building AI responsibly with safeguards, age-appropriate design, and collaboration to protect and empower young people online.
items.title_zh: 儿童安全蓝图简介
items.summary_zh: 了解 OpenAI 的儿童安全蓝图——通过保障措施、适合年龄的设计和协作来负责任地构建 AI 的路线图，以保护和增强上网年轻人的能力。

items.title: Industrial policy for the Intelligence Age
items.summary: Explore our ambitious, people-first industrial policy ideas for the AI era—focused on expanding opportunity, sharing prosperity, and building resilient institutions as advanced intelligence evolves.
items.title_zh: 智能时代的产业政策
items.summary_zh: 探索我们在人工智能时代雄心勃勃、以人为本的产业政策理念——重点是随着先进智能的发展，扩大机会、共享繁荣，并建立有弹性的机构。

items.title: Codex now offers more flexible pricing for teams
items.summary: Codex now includes pay-as-you-go pricing for ChatGPT Business and Enterprise, providing teams a more flexible option to start and scale adoption.
items.title_zh: Codex 现在为团队提供更灵活的定价
items.summary_zh: Codex 现在包括 ChatGPT 商业版和企业版的即用即付定价，为团队提供更灵活的选择来启动和扩展采用。

items.title: Accelerating the next phase of AI
items.summary: OpenAI raises $122 billion in new funding to expand frontier AI globally, invest in next-generation compute, and meet growing demand for ChatGPT, Codex, and enterprise AI.
items.title_zh: 加速人工智能的下一阶段
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 筹集了 1220 亿美元的新资金，用于在全球范围内扩展前沿人工智能，投资下一代计算，并满足对 ChatGPT、Codex 和企业人工智能不断增长的需求。

items.title: Waypoint-1.5: Higher-Fidelity Interactive Worlds for Everyday GPUs
items.title_zh: Waypoint-1.5：适用于日常 GPU 的更高保真度交互世界

items.title: ALTK‑Evolve: On‑the‑Job Learning for AI Agents
items.title_zh: ALTK‑Evolve：AI 代理的在职学习

items.title: Safetensors is Joining the PyTorch Foundation
items.title_zh: Safetensors 即将加入 PyTorch 基金会

items.title: Welcome Gemma 4: Frontier multimodal intelligence on device
items.title_zh: 欢迎 Gemma 4：设备上的前沿多模式智能

items.title: Holo3: Breaking the Computer Use Frontier
items.title_zh: Holo3：打破计算机使用前沿

items.title: Falcon Perception
items.title_zh: 猎鹰感知

items.title: Any Custom Frontend with Gradio's Backend
items.title_zh: 任何带有 Gradio 后端的自定义前端

items.title: Granite 4.0 3B Vision: Compact Multimodal Intelligence for Enterprise Documents
items.title_zh: Granite 4.0 3B Vision：企业文档的紧凑型多模式智能

items.title: New ways to balance cost and reliability in the Gemini API
items.summary: Google is introducing two new inference tiers to the Gemini API, Flex and Priority, to balance cost and latency.
items.title_zh: Gemini API 中平衡成本和可靠性的新方法
items.summary_zh: Google 正在为 Gemini API 引入两个新的推理层：Flex 和 Priority，以平衡成本和延迟。

items.title: Create, edit and share videos at no cost in Google Vids
items.summary: New AI capabilities are coming to Google Vids, powered by Lyria 3 and Veo 3.1, like high-quality video generation at no cost and more.
items.title_zh: 在 Google Vids 中免费创建、编辑和分享视频
items.summary_zh: 由 Lyria 3 和 Veo 3.1 提供支持的 Google Vids 即将推出新的 AI 功能，例如免费生成高质量视频等。

items.title: We’re creating a new satellite imagery map to help protect Brazil’s forests.
items.summary: Google partnered with the Brazilian government on a satellite imagery map to help protect the country’s forests.
items.title_zh: 我们正在创建新的卫星图像地图，以帮助保护巴西的森林。
items.summary_zh: 谷歌与巴西政府合作开发卫星图像地图，以帮助保护该国的森林。

items.title: Watch James Manyika talk AI and creativity with LL COOL J.
items.summary: In the latest episode of our Dialogues on Technology and Society series, LL COOL J sits down with James Manyika.
items.title_zh: 观看 James Manyika 与 LL COOL J 谈论人工智能和创造力。
items.summary_zh: 在我们的技术与社会对话系列的最新一集中，LL COOL J 与 James Manyika 进行了访谈。

items.title: Transform your headphones into a live personal translator on iOS.
items.summary: Google Translate’s Live translate with headphones is officially arriving on iOS! And we're expanding the capability for both iOS and Android users to even more countries…
items.title_zh: 将您的耳机变成 iOS 上的实时个人翻译器。
items.summary_zh: 谷歌翻译的耳机实时翻译功能正式登陆 iOS！我们正在将 iOS 和 Android 用户的功能扩展到更多国家/地区……

items.title: Gemini 3.1 Flash Live: Making audio AI more natural and reliable
items.summary: Gemini 3.1 Flash Live is now available across Google products.
items.title_zh: Gemini 3.1 Flash Live：让音频AI更加自然可靠
items.summary_zh: Gemini 3.1 Flash Live 现已在 Google 产品中提供。

items.title: Search Live is expanding globally
items.summary: We’re expanding Search Live globally, to all languages and locations where AI Mode is available.
items.title_zh: Search Live 正在全球扩张
items.summary_zh: 我们正在全球范围内将 Search Live 扩展到支持 AI 模式的所有语言和地点。

items.title: Sixteen new START.nano companies are developing hard-tech solutions with the support of MIT.nano
items.summary: Startup accelerator program grows to over 30 companies, almost half of them with MIT pedigrees.
items.title_zh: 十六家新的 START.nano 公司正在 MIT.nano 的支持下开发硬技术解决方案
items.summary_zh: 创业加速器计划已发展到超过 30 家公司，其中几乎一半拥有 MIT 出身。

items.title: Working to advance the nuclear renaissance
items.summary: Dean Price, assistant professor in the Department of Nuclear Science and Engineering, sees a bright future for nuclear power, and believes AI can help us realize that vision.
items.title_zh: 致力于推进核复兴
items.summary_zh: 核科学与工程系助理教授 Dean Price 看到了核电的光明前景，并相信人工智能可以帮助我们实现这一愿景。

items.title: Seeing sounds
items.summary: Mariano Salcedo ’25, a master’s student in the new Music Technology and Computation Graduate Program, is designing an AI to visualize and express music and other sounds.
items.title_zh: 看到声音
items.summary_zh: Mariano Salcedo ' 25 是新音乐技术和计算研究生项目的硕士生，正在设计一种人工智能来可视化和表达音乐和其他声音。
